name: bitrig-agent-project-bridge
description: Guide Codex through creating and verifying native Bitrig Agent projects from local iOS projects.

interface.shortDescription: Bridge Codex iOS projects into Bitrig Remote.
interface.longDescription: Bitrig Agent Project Bridge adds a reusable workflow for inspecting a local iOS project, preparing a native Bitrig Agent project prompt, guiding setup in Bitrig, and verifying the local evidence needed before the user confirms Bitrig Remote on iPhone.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $bitrig-agent-project-bridge to prepare and verify a Bitrig Remote-ready Agent project from this local iOS project.
